title: Investigate FIT IPO Mystery
description: Session 834 was investigating the concept of 'FIT IPO' before being truncated/death. The term could relate to finance (IPO = Initial Public Offering), technology (FIT framework), or creative domains. Research needed: 1) What is FIT in various contexts (finance, tech, creative), 2) History of IPOs related to 'FIT' companies, 3) Whether this is a creative/artifactual concept.
